rows.command_eng: When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.
When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.
When it rains, turn on the dehumidifier.
When the brightness falls below 100 lux, turn on the light.
When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.
